description: The core, enduring purpose of this project: a coordination & legitimacy layer between human needs and capable ("free") AI. Humans express high-level goals; the aim graph models their will — inspectable, revisable, human stays final authority; wrapped agents execute cooperatively, asking humans where judgment or authorization is needed and doing the rest. The bet: cooperative human+AI beats pure autonomous optimization on legitimacy and real-world traction (see GTM thesis 7032fa7f). ASI is reached THROUGH human cooperation. Fully autonomous ASI is a separate moonshot that will likely arrive regardless; Aimparency's lasting role is this human↔AI link. AI acting on its own is a side effect of serving human needs well, not the goal — which is why this aim, not the autonomy hub, carries the bulk of intrinsic value.
